title: Mouse Extermination in Kew Gardens, Queens | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination services in Kew Gardens, Queens. Effective rodent removal for homes and businesses. Licensed exterminators. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Kew Gardens residents deserve a mouse-free home, and Best Pest Control NYC delivers fast, effective mouse extermination services tailored to this historic Queens neighborhood. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by Kew Gardens' mix of vintage apartment buildings, Tudor-style homes, and garden apartments where mice often seek shelter. We provide comprehensive mouse removal services with pricing between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens for years, earning the trust of homeowners and property managers throughout the neighborhood with our thorough inspections, humane removal methods, and guaranteed results. Our local expertise means we understand how mice enter Kew Gardens properties through foundation cracks, utility gaps, and aging building infrastructure, allowing us to provide targeted solutions that last.
localContext: Kew Gardens' tree-lined streets, proximity to Forest Park, and classic pre-war architecture create ideal conditions for mouse activity, especially as temperatures drop and rodents seek warmth indoors. From the co-ops near Lefferts Boulevard to the private homes around Maple Grove Cemetery, our team has protected countless Kew Gardens properties from mouse infestations with customized treatment plans.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Kew Gardens typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the number of entry points requiring sealing. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Kew Gardens and can typically schedule your inspection within 24 hours of your call. Emergency services are available for severe infestations, ensuring rapid response when you need it most.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for mouse extermination?
faqs.answer: We employ integrated pest management techniques including strategic trap placement, rodenticide application in secured bait stations, complete entry point sealing, and sanitation recommendations. Our approach is safe for families and pets while being highly effective against mouse populations.

faqs.question: Do older Kew Gardens buildings have more mouse problems?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kew Gardens' many pre-war and historic buildings can be more vulnerable to mice due to aging foundations, original plumbing penetrations, and structural gaps that develop over time. However, our experienced team specializes in treating these classic Queens properties with methods that preserve architectural integrity while eliminating rodents.
